steps.title: Identify the two numbers
steps.content:
One number is given as $x$. The other number is described as 84 less than $x$, which means we subtract 84 from $x$: $x - 84$.
The product $y$ of the two numbers is therefore $x$ times $(x - 84)$. $$y = x(x - 84)$$

steps.title: Match the derived equation to the choices
steps.content: The derived equation $$y = x(x - 84)$$ matches option D. That confirms D is correct.
